mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rules ORDER BY priority ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rules (id, name, protocol, service_name, host, port, conditions_json, responses_json, enabled, priority, tags_json, environments_json, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{protocol}, #{serviceName}, #{host}, #{port}, #{conditionsJson}, #{responsesJson}, #{enabled}, #{priority}, #{tagsJson}, #{environmentsJson}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE rules SET name = #{name}, protocol = #{protocol}, service_name = #{serviceName}, host = #{host}, port = #{port}, conditions_json = #{conditionsJson}, responses_json = #{responsesJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, priority = #{priority}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, environments_json = #{environmentsJson}, version = #{version}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_history (rule_id, rule_snapshot, created_at) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{snapshot}, #{createdAt})
